zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Mauduit於大約1134年出生在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾韓斯洛普時，她的父親William de Mauduit II44歲，母親Maude Hanslape57歲。她於大約1154年與John de Bidun在英國巴金哈姆爾拉文登結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1210年之前在英國巴金哈姆爾拉文登。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Mauduit于大约1134年出生在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾韓斯洛普时，她的父亲William de Mauduit II44岁，母亲Maude Hanslape57岁。她于大约1154年与John de Bidun在英国巴金哈姆爾拉文登结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1210年之前在英国巴金哈姆爾拉文登。

nameMeanings.name: Mauduit
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Mawditt
meanings: Norman, English: nickname from Old French mal-duit ‘badly brought up, ill educated’ (Latin male doctus).

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Mauduit was born about 1134, in Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, William de Mauduit II, was 44 and her mother, Maude Hanslape, was 57. She married John de Bidun about 1154, in Lavendon, Buckinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. She died before 1210, in Lavendon, Buckinghamshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Mauduit est née environ 1134, à Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Mauduit II, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Maude Hanslape, avait 57 ans. Elle a épousé John de Bidun environ 1154, à Lavendon, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée avant 1210, à Lavendon, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Mauduit um 1134 in Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Mauduit II 44 und ihre Mutter Maude Hanslape 57. Sie hat um 1154 in Lavendon, Buckinghamshire, England John de Bidun geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb vor 1210 in Lavendon, Buckinghamshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Mauduit è nata il circa 1134 nel Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, William de Mauduit II, aveva 44 anni e sua madre, Maude Hanslape, aveva 57 anni. Lei sposato John de Bidun circa 1154, nel Lavendon, Buckinghamshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. Morì prima del 1210, nel Lavendon, Buckinghamshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Mauduitが約1134年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアハンスロペで生まれた時，父William de Mauduit IIは44歳，母Maude Hanslapeは57歳であった。約1154年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアラベンドンでJohn de Bidunと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1210年以前にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアラベンドンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Mauduit(이)가 대략 1134년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 핸슬로프에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Mauduit II(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maude Hanslape(은)는 57세였다. 그녀는 대략 1154년 영국 벅잉함실르 레이븐던에서 John de Bidun(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1210년 이전 영국 벅잉함실르 레이븐던에서 사망했다.

mn.Lavendon, Buckinghamshire, England, Unit: Lavendon, Buccingahamscir, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Mauduit nasceu aproximadamente 1134, em Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William de Mauduit II, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Maude Hanslape, tinha 57 anos. Ela casou-se com John de Bidun aproximadamente 1154, em Lavendon, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu antes 1210, em Lavendon, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Mauduit родилась около 1134 г. в местности ханслоп, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William de Mauduit II было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Maude Hanslape, 57. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Bidun около 1154 г. в местности лавендон, буккингхамшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла перед 1210 г. в местности лавендон, буккингхамшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Mauduit nació aproximadamente 1134, en Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William de Mauduit II, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Maude Hanslape, tenía 57 años. Se casó con John de Bidun aproximadamente 1154, en Lavendon, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió antes de 1210, en Lavendon, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra.
